pundit.name: Clint Dempsey
pundit.take: **Mustard Boy's bafflin' strategy of draftin' Saudi Arabia for their oil goals isn't quite workin' out, and that's why he's sittin' dead last.** Now, Mustard Boy Zach might be feelin' a little cooked with just 6 points, tryin' to back himself with Austria's win, but he's gotta do better than hopin' Brazil can carry him all the way. On the flip side, how about The Noisemaker Rafe? First-timer draftin' like he's tryin' to pick up a lottery ticket, yet he's somehow top dog at 9 points. That chaos magic's workin', and I can't explain it, but ain't that the beauty of soccer? Meanwhile, Ghost Pepper Devin is right behind, inchin' up with Spain and Norway puttin' in work. Looks like Bubba G Gunner's got his work cut out for him, scramblin' to keep pace after that France-Senegal showdown. The Backpass Assassin Gayden's sittin' kinda comfy mid-table right now, but you gotta wonder if he's got enough firepower to make it through after Jordan got cooked by Austria. Keep your head on a swivel, fellas — this league ain't givin' out no free rides.

pundit_takes.headline: Mustard Boy Still Last Despite Austria's Victory Over Jordan
pundit_takes.subtitle: Zach celebrates moving up to fifth place after Austria's win.

pundit_takes.headline: Backpass Assassin's England Set to Face Croatia in Major Test
pundit_takes.subtitle: Gayden confident his Tier 1 pick won't backfire today.

pundit_takes.headline: Bubba G's DR Congo Poised for Upset Against Portugal
pundit_takes.subtitle: Gunner plans to sit back and let the team handle it.

pundit_takes.headline: Noisemaker Leads Despite Fielding Non-Qualifiers, Success Baffles Experts
pundit_takes.subtitle: Rafe tops standings with zero points from drafted match wins.

rome_analytics_quotes: Rafe's teenage chaos reigns at the top — who saw this coming?
Rafe drafting like he's blindfolded yet still leads; pure chaos genius.
Gayden schools his son Rafe 1-0; Thanksgiving dinner's gonna be awkward!
Rafe's blind draft leaves the model scratching its head. Chaos rules!
